name: pipx
description: Install and Run Python Applications in Isolated Environments

name: --help
-h
options.description: Show help for pipx

args.name: package_spec
args.description: Package name or pip installation spec

options.name: --include-deps
options.description: Include apps of dependent packages

options.name: --force
options.description: Modify existing virtual environment and files in PIPX_BIN_DIR

options.name: --suffix
options.description: Optional suffix for virtual environment and executable names

options.name: --python
options.description: The Python executable used to create the Virtual Environment and run the associated app/apps. Must be v3.6+

options.name: --system-site-packages
options.description: Give the virtual environment access to the system site-packages dir

name: --index-url
-i
options.description: Base URL of Python Package Index

name: --editable
-e
options.description: Install a project in editable mode

options.name: --pip-args
options.description: Arbitrary pip arguments to pass directly to pip install/upgrade commands

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show verbose output

subcommands.name: inject
subcommands.description: Installs packages to an existing pipx-managed virtual environment

args.name: package
args.description: Name of the existing pipx-managed Virtual Environment to inject into

args.name: dependencies
args.description: The packages to inject into the Virtual Environment--either package name or pip package spec

options.name: --include-apps
options.description: Add apps from the injected packages onto your PATH

options.name: --include-deps
options.description: Include apps of dependent packages

options.name: --system-site-packages
options.description: Give the virtual environment access to the system site-packages dir

-i
options.description: Base URL of Python Package Index

-e
options.description: Install a project in editable mode

options.name: --pip-args
options.description: Arbitrary pip arguments to pass directly to pip install/upgrade commands

name: --force
-f
options.description: Modify existing virtual environment and files in PIPX_BIN_DIR

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show verbose output

subcommands.name: upgrade
subcommands.description: Upgrade a package in a pipx-managed Virtual Environment by running 'pip install --upgrade PACKAGE'

options.name: --include-injected

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List packages and apps installed with pipx

options.name: --include-injected
options.description: Show packages injected into the main app's environment

options.description: Output rich data in json format

options.name: --short
options.description: List packages only

options.description: Show verbose output

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: Download the latest version of a package to a temporary virtual environment, then run an app from it

args.name: app
args.description: App/package name and any arguments to be passed to it

options.name: --no-cache
options.description: Do not re-use cached virtual environment if it exists

options.name: --pypackages
options.description: Require app to be run from local __pypackages__ directory

options.name: --spec
options.description: The package name or specific installation source passed to pip

options.name: --python
options.description: The Python version to run package's CLI app with

options.name: --system-site-packages
options.description: Give the virtual environment access to the system site-packages dir

name: --index-url
-i
options.description: Base URL of Python Package Index

name: --editable
-e
options.description: Install a project in editable mode

options.name: --pip-args
options.description: Arbitrary pip arguments to pass directly to pip install/upgrade commands

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show verbose output

subcommands.name: runpip
subcommands.description: Run pip in an existing pipx-managed Virtual Environment

args.name: package
args.description: Name of the existing pipx-managed Virtual Environment to run pip in

args.name: pipargs
args.description: Arguments to forward to pip command

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show verbose output

subcommands.name: ensurepath
subcommands.description: Ensure directory where pipx stores apps is in your PATH environment variable

name: --force
-f
options.description: Add text to your shell's config file even if it looks like your PATH already contains paths to pipx and pipx-install apps

subcommands.name: environment
subcommands.description: Print a list of variables used in pipx.constants

options.name: --value
options.description: Print the value of the variable

subcommands.name: completions
subcommands.description: Print instructions on enabling shell completions for pipx
